CustomField.description: Reason for not-booking where enquiry or quote has gone cold OR Reason for booking cancellation where relevant.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Reason for not-booking where enquiry or quote has gone cold OR Reason for booking cancellation where relevant.
CustomField.label: Reason for Colding

value.fullName: No response from the client after initial contact
value.label: No response from the client after initial contact

value.fullName: No response from the client after having been responsive initially
value.label: No response from the client after having been responsive initially

value.fullName: Client not travelling as too expensive
value.label: Client not travelling as too expensive

value.fullName: Client booked through a competitor based on price
value.label: Client booked through a competitor based on price

value.fullName: Client booked through a competitor based on knowledge
value.label: Client booked through a competitor based on knowledge

value.fullName: Client booked through a competitor based on turnaround speed
value.label: Client booked through a competitor based on turnaround speed

value.fullName: Client booked through a competitor based on product preference
value.label: Client booked through a competitor based on product preference

value.fullName: Enquiry politely declined by consultant due to unrealistic budget
value.label: Enquiry politely declined by consultant due to unrealistic budget
